rationale: Section 11.351 cross-references Section 11.13 only for the definition of 'residence homestead,' not for the exemption dollar amount in §11.13(b). The fire-damage exemption is independently calculated from appraised value and a time fraction, so raising the §11.13(b) amount has no effect.
quote: "residence homestead" has the meaning assigned by Section 11.13.
_note: No conflict; §11.351 references §11.13 for definitional purposes only, not for the exemption amount in subsection (b).
